title: Lucid Group Earnings Dates, Reports, Calls 2016-2026
text: WallStreetZen provides comprehensive historical earnings data for Lucid from IPO through 2026. Earnings dates clearly marked with actual results when reported. The historical archive allows comparison of guidance changes over time. The data shows consistent theme of production ramp paired with expanding losses. The archive useful for tracking how company guidance and execution have evolved since going public.
